mnemonics.title: F for Front, R for Rear, M for Modulo
mnemonics.content: To remember how to update pointers: For enqueue, Update Rear using Modulo (R + 1) % cap. For dequeue, Update Front using Modulo (F + 1) % cap. Remember the acronym F-R-M or R-F-M.

mnemonics.title: Full Check
mnemonics.content: Remember the condition for a full queue: Is the slot right after the Rear (i.e., (Rear+1)) pointing to the Front? If yes, then it's Full. ((R+1) % cap == F).
